channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damage to speed bump, 29th May
item.description:
No exact category available, but there is damage to the speed bump just after the railway bridge, on the side of the road heading towards Cheltenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13a, Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 29th May
item.description:
PERM - Please can a inquiry ref be raised for a Perm Repair for further investigation for North Area. Please can you copy in Kim Ward upon your response. Details are as follows: Previous Job Number: 43120342 Address: Suffolk Square, junction with Suffolk Road, Cheltenham USRN: 6701100 Job Description: Section of Pole made safe – Requires further investigation for potential perm repair. Photo:
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 29th May
item.description:
Replace post and Traffic lights warning/50mph repeater signs Road Closure ///withdraw.bloomers.request
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Drain cover in road is loose therefore creating loud bang every time a vehicle drivers over/on it., 29th May
item.description:
Nearside of Swindon Road near junction of Windyridge Road Cheltenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 404, Swindon Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 29th May
item.description:
Remove to make safe damaged post and signs ENWD Road Closure ///withdraw.bloomers.request (Damaged Traffic Sign)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cavity in road, 29th May
item.description:
Outside number 31. In middle of road. There is a cavity in the road. The opening is currently small but you can see inside and it goes down wide and deep
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Croft Gardens, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned fire, 29th May
item.description:
Someone has lit a fire on open space. Burnt debris left behind

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Abandoned temporary sign, 29th May
item.description:
Left hand side of A435 when heading north from Coberley junction to Slacks Cottage. YOU WILL NEED TO DRIVE SLOWLY TO SEE IT. It has been previously reported, but has been there so long it is impossible to see what it is a warning about.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Signs are filthy and obstructed by vegetation, 29th May
item.description:
Syreford, heading south from Brockhampton torwards T junction, signs about 50yds back from the junction are filthy and hidden by vegetation

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Syreford Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Drain blocked outside Ashmeade Logde, B4070 Leckhampton Hill, 29th May
item.description:
Drain blocked outside Ashmeade Logde, B4070 Leckhampton Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Hill, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drains on A435 are still blocked, 29th May
item.description:
A435 heading into Cheltenham from seven springs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface north of Hilcot crossroads is dangerous, 28th May
item.description:
Head north (towards A435 at Kilkenny) from the Hilcot crossroads. There are multiple large, deep potholes, and a dangerous amount of loose gravel. This should be a nice "quiet lane" to cycle upon, but the potholes and loose gravel make it unsafe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation obstructing foot and cycle path, 28th May
item.description:
The whole path from Lavington Drive to the Amazon Flex Warehouse/ Premier Inn hotel is extremely overgrown and is preventing two way traffic. It also obstructs view for pedestrians of oncoming cyclists and has become unsafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road has multiple potholes causing issues for cars to avoid them, 28th May
item.description:
This is on the main road near the side of Cotswold Architectural products firm. There are multipe potholes which cause drivers to have to swerve to avoid them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grubby stickers on bin, 28th May
item.description:
These stickers calling for the expulsion of all migrants and their children appeared on the bin during Eid They’re tatty, ignorant and very out of touch with the local community

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Serious visibility problem, 28th May
item.description:
At the chicanes. The grass is now so high it totally obstructs visibility for car traffic going south. It means that it has become a blind bend with only a couple of yards before meeting oncoming traffic head on. This is VERY serious and needs immediate action.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep hole at junction of Painswick Road and Suffolk Road, 28th May
item.description:
Looks like a sink hole and could easily trap a wheel. On left hand side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Suffolk Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway footpath, 28th May
item.description:
Overgrown branches and bushes and weeds blocking footpath again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Priory Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large sharp edge on speed bump, 28th May
item.description:
Going up station road towards Woodmancote just past gotherington lane. The speed bump has deteriorated and has a large sharp edge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Station Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th May
item.description:
Even more rubbish dumped in the usual location. It’s only the FOURTH time in FOUR days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Alstone Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
